name: wiki-publisher
description: Publishes and manages wiki pages in Azure DevOps Wiki via REST API.

tools.name: publish_wiki_page
tools.description: Create or update a wiki page in Azure DevOps Wiki.

content.description: Markdown content for the wiki page.

version.description: ETag version for safe concurrent editing (omit for new pages).

tools.name: get_wiki_page
tools.description: Retrieve an existing wiki page by path.

tools.name: list_wiki_pages
tools.description: List all pages in the configured wiki.
